rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings.
Ensure assumptions and guarantees refer to valid component ports in appropriate scopes.
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Declare constants and equations with correct AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool).
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type scope guarantees; avoid implementation-only paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and implication =>.
Assignments in implementation scope must target existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
